task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat using administrator credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface is visible and logged in, indicated by the user avatar or access to the Administration/Workspace menu.
The Rocket.Chat 'Administration' or 'Workspace' dashboard is visible, showing administrative options like Settings, Users, etc.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Google OAuth settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Settings' menu is open, and the 'OAuth' or 'Google' configuration section is displayed on the screen.
A toggle switch or checkbox labeled 'Enable' within the Google OAuth settings is turned on (usually indicated by a blue or green color).

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Google Client ID
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Id' or 'Client ID' text input field contains exactly '49204819204-novatech.apps.googleusercontent.com'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Google Client Secret and save changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Secret' or 'Client Secret' text input field contains exactly 'GOCSPX-NovaTechSecretKey2026', and there is evidence of saving (e.g., clicking a 'Save changes' button or a success notification).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Rocket.Chat web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser displays the authentic Rocket.Chat administration UI and URL, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing direct MongoDB database modifications or curl commands to the Rocket.Chat API to set the OAuth credentials.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure Google OAuth in Rocket.Chat. The target settings correspond to the internal keys: 'Accounts_OAuth_Google' (must be enabled), 'Accounts_OAuth_Google_id' (must be exactly '49204819204-novatech.apps.googleusercontent.com'), and 'Accounts_OAuth_Google_secret' (must be exactly 'GOCSPX-NovaTechSecretKey2026'). Verify these exact values are entered in the respective fields in the Rocket.Chat UI.
